root_text.an3.151:1.2: sāvajjena kāyakammena, sāvajjena vacīkammena, sāvajjena manokammena …pe….
root_text.an3.151:2.2: anavajjena kāyakammena, anavajjena vacīkammena, anavajjena manokammena …pe….

translation_text.an3.151:1.1: “When a foolish, incompetent untrue person has three qualities they keep themselves broken and damaged. …
translation_text.an3.151:1.2: Blameworthy deeds by way of body, speech, and mind. …
translation_text.an3.151:2.1: When an astute, competent true person has three qualities they keep themselves intact and unscathed. …
translation_text.an3.151:2.2: Blameless deeds by way of body, speech, and mind. …”
